meaning: n.鑷嗘祴,鐚滄祴,鍑寽娴嬫墍浣滀箣宸ヤ綔
examples: It was pure guesswork on our part.
We don't deal in rumours or guesswork.
We can't make a decision based on hearsay and guesswork.
For most of us in the online journalism business, writing headlines basically amounts to guesswork.
The criteria for which pages are targeted for the supplemental index remains a subject of guesswork.
